name: Grand Opening Week
description: Ribbon cannons, coupon mascots, and the unhinged optimism of the Mallcore relaunch send curious shoppers ricocheting through every storefront.
announcement_text: Grand Opening Week kicks off tomorrow. The mascot already knocked over the pretzel stand.
active_text: Grand Opening Week is live. Every store is riding the ribbon-cutting chaos.

name: Sports Season Kickoff
description: The city loses its collective mind for opening whistles, lucky pennants, and any collectible that can be waved dramatically from the food court railing.
announcement_text: Sports Season Kickoff starts tomorrow. Foam fingers are already appearing in the parking lot.
active_text: Sports Season Kickoff is here. Memorabilia hunters are sprinting between display cases.

name: Collector's Convention Weekend
description: Badge-wearing traders spill out of Concourse Con Annex with rolling binders, whispered wants lists, and exactly zero chill about limited runs.
announcement_text: Collector's Convention Weekend starts tomorrow. Binder backpacks have reached critical mass.
active_text: Collector's Convention Weekend is underway. Traders and retro hunters are flooding the corridor.

name: Back-to-School Rush
description: Parents hunt for morale-saving gadgets while students negotiate for one last fun purchase before the semester devours their free time.
announcement_text: Back-to-School Rush starts tomorrow. Expect stressed parents and heroic impulse purchases.
active_text: Back-to-School Rush is on. Electronics counters and retro shelves are getting mobbed.

name: Holiday Shopping Season
description: Gift lists, decorative snowflakes, and the annual mall rumor that a mechanical reindeer grants good luck to anyone who buys three things at once.
announcement_text: Holiday Shopping Season starts tomorrow. The gift-wrap kiosk has already formed a line.
active_text: Holiday Shopping Season is here. Every register in the mall is earning its keep.

name: Post-Holiday Slump
description: The tinsel is gone, wallets are hollow, and shoppers now enter stores with the haunted focus of people comparing clearance stickers to couch-cushion coins.
announcement_text: Post-Holiday Slump lands tomorrow. Even the escalators sound tired.
active_text: Post-Holiday Slump has settled in. The mall is running on gift-card fumes.
